message:
feat: Implement real terminal control, codecs error handlers, and POP3 socket I/O

curses.zig - Real terminal control using termios:
- echo()/noecho(): Enable/disable character echo
- cbreak()/nocbreak(): Enable/disable line buffering
- raw()/noraw(): Enable/disable raw mode (no processing)
- has_colors(): Check TERM env for color support
- start_color()/init_pair(): Color pair management
- Proper termios state management with save/restore

codecs.zig - Error handler registration system:
- ErrorHandlerFn type and registry
- register_error(): Store custom error handlers
- lookup_error(): Retrieve handlers with built-in fallbacks
- Built-in handlers: strict, ignore, replace

getpass.zig - Cross-platform TTY functions:
- isatty(): Windows GetConsoleMode, Unix posix.isatty
- ttyname(): Return controlling terminal path

poplib.zig - Real POP3 socket operations:
- connect(): Socket creation, timeout, TCP connect, welcome read
- putCmd(): Send commands over socket
- getResp(): Read and parse +OK/-ERR responses
